description: Browser-based TUI demo of a parallel Claude Code session manager with git-worktree isolation. Spawn multiple agents on independent tasks, watch live tool-call output per agent, kill or clear finished sessions.
features: Terminal-aesthetic TUI layout (sidebar + output pane + status bar)
Spawn agents with custom tasks or random demo tasks
Live tool-call output stream per agent (Read, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep simulation)
Status indicators: spawning / active / idle / done / error
Elapsed time, token count, tool call count per session
Kill running agents or clear completed/errored sessions (K key)
Keyboard navigation (N new, K kill/clear, ↑↓ navigate)
JetBrains Mono font, GitHub Dark color palette
Auto-scroll to latest output per session
